title: Devcontainer
description: Official resourcepack for the dev container private server.
body:
# Main Description
Experience a refined Minecraft gameplay with our carefully curated mod package. This collection enhances the gaming experience without deviating from the core vanilla feel of the game. Introduce variety to your journey with additions like [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-fabric), [Expanded Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/expanded-delight), and [Immersive Aircraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-aircraft), providing nuanced gameplay. Engage in captivating explorations with [Explorify](https://modrinth.com/datapack/explorify), [Underground Bunkers](https://modrinth.com/mod/underground-bunkers), and **YUNG’s additions**, while catering to the needs of builders through **Macaw’s mods** and various furniture mods.

## Performance and Eyecandy
Prioritizing performance, the Modpack integrates essential optimizations for both server and client. Notable additions like [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) and [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) ensure a smoother gaming experience. Immerse yourself in visual enhancements with [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) and [More Mob Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-mob-variants), subtly elevating the overall immersion.

## Quality of Life
the Modpack includes Quality of Life additions, like [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu), [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi), [JourneyMap](https://modrinth.com/mod/journeymap), and [Inmis](https://modrinth.com/mod/inmis), streamlining server activities and emphasizing the exploratory aspect of the pack.
